'''ân-th-h''' ('''kanathah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ponderize|ponderize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ponderize|ponderize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-th-h
|-
! Lemma
| kanathah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinathah|thinathah]] || [[word:jinathah|jinathah]] || [[word:shinathah|shinathah]] || [[word:kinathah|kinathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunathah|thuthunathah]] || [[word:jujunathah|jujunathah]] || [[word:shushunathah|shushunathah]] || [[word:kukunathah|kukunathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunathah|thunathah]] || [[word:junathah|junathah]] || [[word:shunathah|shunathah]] || [[word:kunathah|kunathah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunathah|thunathah]] || [[word:junathah|junathah]] || [[word:shunathah|shunathah]] || [[word:kunathah|kunathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenathah|thenathah]] || [[word:jenathah|jenathah]] || [[word:shenathah|shenathah]] || [[word:kenathah|kenathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonathah|thothonathah]] || [[word:jojonathah|jojonathah]] || [[word:shoshonathah|shoshonathah]] || [[word:kokonathah|kokonathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonathah|thonathah]] || [[word:jonathah|jonathah]] || [[word:shonathah|shonathah]] || [[word:konathah|konathah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonathah|thonathah]] || [[word:jonathah|jonathah]] || [[word:shonathah|shonathah]] || [[word:konathah|konathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnathah|thĂŠnathah]] || [[word:jĂŠnathah|jĂŠnathah]] || [[word:shĂŠnathah|shĂŠnathah]] || [[word:kĂŠnathah|kĂŠnathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanathah|thathanathah]] || [[word:jajanathah|jajanathah]] || [[word:shashanathah|shashanathah]] || [[word:kakanathah|kakanathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanathah|thanathah]] || [[word:janathah|janathah]] || [[word:shanathah|shanathah]] || [[word:kanathah|kanathah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanathah|thanathah]] || [[word:janathah|janathah]] || [[word:shanathah|shanathah]] || [[word:kanathah|kanathah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanathah|shanathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanathah|goshanathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanathah|gokishanathah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanathahnĂŒ|shanathahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanathahnknĂŒ|goshanathahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathahnĂŒ|gokishanathahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanathahshĂ«|shanathahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanathahnkshĂ«|goshanathahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanathahshĂ«|gokishanathahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathahro|shanathahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathahnkro|goshanathahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathahro|gokishanathahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathahmu|shanathahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathahnkmu|goshanathahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathahmu|gokishanathahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanathahsher|shanathahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanathahnksher|goshanathahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanathahsher|gokishanathahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanathahng|shanathahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanathahnkng|goshanathahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanathahng|gokishanathahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanathahya|shanathahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanathahnkya|goshanathahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanathahya|gokishanathahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanathahyam|shanathahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanathahnkyam|goshanathahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanathahyam|gokishanathahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathahnĂŒshĂ«|shanathahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanathahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanathahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathahnĂŒro|shanathahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathahnknĂŒro|goshanathahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathahnĂŒro|gokishanathahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathahnĂŒmu|shanathahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathahnknĂŒmu|goshanathahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathahnĂŒmu|gokishanathahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathahshĂ«nĂŒ|shanathahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanathahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanathahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathahshĂ«ro|shanathahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathahnkshĂ«ro|goshanathahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathahshĂ«ro|gokishanathahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathahshĂ«mu|shanathahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathahnkshĂ«mu|goshanathahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathahshĂ«mu|gokishanathahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathahronĂŒ|shanathahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathahnkronĂŒ|goshanathahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathahronĂŒ|gokishanathahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathahroshĂ«|shanathahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathahnkroshĂ«|goshanathahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathahroshĂ«|gokishanathahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathahromu|shanathahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathahnkromu|goshanathahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathahromu|gokishanathahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathahmunĂŒ|shanathahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathahnkmunĂŒ|goshanathahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathahmunĂŒ|gokishanathahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathahmushĂ«|shanathahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathahnkmushĂ«|goshanathahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathahmushĂ«|gokishanathahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathahmuro|shanathahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathahnkmuro|goshanathahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathahmuro|gokishanathahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
